tagline: Pipeline intelligence for RevOps teams that close faster
targetAudience: VP of Revenue Operations and Revenue Operations Managers at B2B SaaS companies with 50–500 employees
keyBenefit: Connect your CRM, marketing automation, and sales engagement tools into a single revenue intelligence layer — forecast accurately, identify pipeline risk early, and coach reps with deal-level signal.
customInstructions: Tone: confident, data-driven, direct. No filler adjectives. Hero must include the phrase 'pipeline intelligence'. Feature sections should use specific RevOps metrics (win rate, pipeline coverage, deal velocity).
